title: ICRISAT Medium - Term Plan 2009 - 2011 Championing the Causes of the Poor through Agriculture Research for Development
abstract:
Retrospective: How the context in 2007/8 has changed plans for 2009: ICRISAT is now
approaching its next EPMR (2008/9). It had a most constructive and productive year in 2007
and was rated outstanding by the World Bank based on its 2006 Performance Indicators.
The projected expenditure for 2008 has increased to $39.1 Million from $32.6 Million in
2007.
